headline: Campbell’s Ties Supply Chain Leadership To Food Safety And Valuation Gap
summary: Campbell’s Company (NasdaqGS:CPB) has appointed Cassandra Green as Chief Supply Chain Officer. Green’s role now includes responsibility for food safety and quality in addition to end to end supply chain operations. The expanded remit covers logistics, procurement, manufacturing, and quality functions across the business. For you as an investor, the key point is that Campbell’s is tying supply chain leadership directly to food safety and quality, which sit at the core of a packaged food...
